name: powerbi-modeling-codex
description: Codex plugin for operating Power BI semantic models and PBIR report projects through the official modeling MCP plus a local report authoring MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Connect and edit Power BI semantic models from Codex
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill and local MCP wiring for Power BI semantic model operations plus PBIR report authoring workflows, including pages, visuals, field bindings, and basic formatting.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my PBIX in Power BI Desktop and list tables/columns.
Create or update a DAX measure using measure_operations.
Open my PBIR project and create a clustered column chart on a new page.
Validate model and report changes and summarize what was modified.
